div.style: color: rgb(226, 234, 245) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source A — Booking Agency
CSV · latin-1 · semicolon-delimited

div.style: color: rgb(226, 234, 245) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source B — Dept Approvals
JSON · nested · trip_ref as ID

div.style: color: rgb(226, 234, 245) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source C — Finance & Insurance
XLSX · combined trip_dates cell

div.style: color: rgb(237, 233, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Connector A
─────────────────
Delimiter: semicolon
traveler_name → traveller_name

div.style: color: rgb(237, 233, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Connector B
─────────────────
Flatten approval_chain
trip_ref → trip_id
employee → traveller_name
trip_dates object → depart / return

div.style: color: rgb(237, 233, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Connector C
─────────────────
insured_name → traveller_name
trip_dates string → depart / return

div.style: color: rgb(254, 243, 199) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Validation
─────────────────
• Date range guard — catches T-9999
• booking_ref format — catches BK-EXT-77
• Status vocabulary check
• Required fields check

div.style: color: rgb(254, 226, 226) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
👤 Human Review Queue
─────────────────
• INVALID_TEST_RECORD
• BOOKING_REF_FORMAT_ANOMALY
• AMBIGUOUS_APPROVAL_STATUS
• APPROVER_IDENTITY_CONFLICT
• Low-confidence name match
─────────────────
Promote to Unified View or discard

div.style: color: rgb(254, 243, 199) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Normalization
─────────────────
• Title-case traveller names
• ISO 8601 dates
• policy_type → multi-value array
• Unified field names

div.style: color: rgb(254, 243, 199) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Entity Resolution
─────────────────
• Match on trip_id
• Fallback: dept_code + traveller_name
• Fuzzy match: edit distance ≤ 2
• Flag incomplete_sources

div.style: color: rgb(254, 243, 199) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deduplication & Conflict Resolution
─────────────────
• Status priority: approved > delegate_recorded
• Dates: Source B wins
• B vs C conflict → Human Review
• Secondary records → Audit Table

div.style: color: rgb(209, 250, 229) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Unified Trip View
─────────────────
trip_id · traveller_name · dept_code
depart_date · return_date · destination
quote_amount · approved_amount · premium_eur
booking_ref · policy_id · approval_status
incomplete_sources · data_quality_flags

div.style: color: rgb(209, 250, 229) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Approval Audit Table
─────────────────
Full history of all approval events
Retains duplicate and delegate records
